sentences.arabic: كَانَ رَاعٍ اسْمُهُ جَابِرٌ يَرْعَى الْغَنَمَ فِي الْجَبَلِ.
sentences.translation: Bio je pastir po imenu Džabir koji je čuvao ovce u planini.
sentences.translationEn: There was a shepherd named Jabir who tended his sheep in the mountain.

sentences.arabic: ذَاتَ يَوْمٍ ضَلَّتْ خَرُوفٌ صَغِيرٌ وَابْتَعَدَ عَنِ الْقَطِيعِ.
sentences.translation: Jednog dana se malo ovče zalutalo i udaljilo od stada.
sentences.translationEn: One day a small lamb got lost and strayed from the flock.

sentences.arabic: بَحَثَ جَابِرٌ عَنْهُ طَوِيلًا حَتَّى وَجَدَهُ بَيْنَ الأَشْجَارِ.
sentences.translation: Džabir ga je dugo tražio dok ga nije pronašao između stabala.
sentences.translationEn: Jabir searched for it a long time until he found it among the trees.

sentences.arabic: حَمَلَهُ بِرِفْقٍ وَأَعَادَهُ إِلَى بَقِيَّةِ الْقَطِيعِ.
sentences.translation: Nježno ga je podigao i vratio ga ostatku stada.
sentences.translationEn: He gently carried it and returned it to the rest of the flock.
